title: The Magic Toy Shop Light Up Yoyo for Kids – Great for Beginners, Fun Flashing Toy Gift – Christmas Stocking Filler for Children
features: BEGINNER-FRIENDLY PLAY: This yoyo for kids beginners has a responsive yoyo bearing for easy control and smooth returns.
EXCITING LIGHT-UP FUN: The yoyo kids light up when spun, creating a bright and fun visual effect.
SAFE & DURABLE: Made from sturdy plastic, this childrens yoyo is lightweight and built for everyday play.
GREAT GIFT IDEA: Perfect as a Christmas stocking filler or yoyo party bag fillers, each yo yo kids receive comes in a surprise colour.

Specifications: Packaging Dimensions: Height 16.5cm, Depth 10.5cm, Width 4cm, Weight 45gm / Item Dimensions: Height 16.5cm, Depth 10.5cm, Width 4cm / Brand: The Magic Toy Shop / Material: Plastic / Minimum Age: 3 Years+ / Assorted Colours (Comes in multiple colours, specific colour cannot be selected)
